atlas_name: A prenatal skin atlas reveals immune regulation of human skin morphogenesis
name_origin: Named by Gopee et al. (2024) based on expression of TREM2, P2RY12, CX3CR1 and OLFML3 -- markers shared with brain microglia. Macrophage subsets in prenatal skin were annotated using marker genes from Suo et al. (2022).
notes: TML macrophages are one of four macrophage subsets (LYVE1+, MHCII+, TML, iron-recycling) identified in prenatal skin. They are yolk-sac derived and highly correlated with embryonic brain microglia (Mac4).
